data.title: Encryption in Transit and At Rest
data.description: Data is encrypted during transmission and storage to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL for data in transit; AES-256 encryption for data at rest.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Mandatory two-step verification for enhanced security.
data.technical_spec: Authentication via password and secondary method like SMS or app-based token.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Employs machine learning models to detect and mitigate threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: AI-based anomaly detection and intrusion prevention systems.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Incentivizes external researchers to find and report security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Reward-based program with public disclosure policy.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts continuous security assessments to identify potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Internal and third-party security audits and penetration testing.
